overall.description: Aerial drone footage rendered in a game engine, showcasing a smooth flight over snow-covered alpine peaks and ridges. The camera glides above a vast mountainous landscape with clouds filling the valleys below, revealing expansive vistas under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain ridge above cloud-filled valley

agents.ego_description: flying steadily forward over the snow-covered ridge toward the valley with clouds below

entered.detail: distinct rocky mountain peak with exposed stone face on the left side of the frame
layer of white clouds and fog filling the valley between mountain ranges
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the far background across the valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view gliding over a pristine snow-covered mountain ridge. A prominent rocky peak stands on the left while clouds fill the valley below, partially obscuring the distant mountain ranges. The camera maintains steady forward flight over the white alpine terrain under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff edge with expansive alpine vista

events.description: steep cliff face emerges on the right side as the camera turns slightly rightward

agents.ego_description: continuing aerial flight while banking slightly right to reveal the cliff edge and broader mountain panorama

entered.detail: vertical snow-covered cliff with exposed rock strata on the right side of the flight path

segments.scene_description: As the flight continues, the camera turns slightly right to reveal a dramatic steep cliff face on the right side. The rocky peak from the previous segment passes behind and out of view, while the valley clouds shift to the left side of the frame. The scene opens up to show a vast expanse of snow-covered peaks extending into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide over a pristine alpine ridge that gradually opens into a vast panorama of distant snow-covered peaks. It begins by moving steadily over a white mountain ridge under a bright midday sun, with a prominent rocky peak on the left and clouds filling the valley below. As the flight continues, the camera turns slightly right, causing the rocky peak to pass out of view while the valley clouds shift toward the left of the frame. This movement reveals a dramatic, steep cliff face on the right before the scene finally expands to showcase an immense expanse of frozen summits stretching toward the horizon.
